name: Guadalupa Chili"corn" Chane
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer half of the corn chips in a 1-quart casserole dish.
2. Mix sour cream and chili together and pour over the chips.
3. Add another layer of chips.
4. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the top.
5. Mix the cornbread according to the box recipe.
6. In a separate bowl, combine corn, black olives, and pimentos with the cornbread batter.
7. Pour the mixture over the top of the casserole.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes or until the cornbread is done.
